para_trans: About the new title of the Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme...
Department of Social Justice and Feats Assistance
Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Marg, Mantralaya,
Read: Government Decision No. BGT-2024 / P.No.136 / Budget / (VISAYO) D. 19.03.2025

Preamble: - Pre-matric Scholarship Scheme, a) Savitribai Phule Scholarship Scheme for SC students from 5th to 7th and 8th to 10th B) Maharishi Vithal Ramji Shinde Tuition Fee / Examination Fee Scheme c) Quality Scholarship Scheme for SC students studying in Secondary School The Government was considering to approve opening of a separate title for the scheme.

Jhasan Decision: - Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme, e. Savitribai Phule Scholarship Scheme for SC students from 5th to 7th and 8th to 10th B. Maharishi Vitthal Ramji Shinde Tuition Fee / Examination Fee Scheme c. Quality Scholarship Scheme for SC students studying in Secondary School is being approved as under.
